changes.description: Created targeted SKILL.md optimized for gemini-3-flash on openclaw. Key design decisions: (1) Concise, direct instructions with no fluff - gemini-3-flash responds well to explicit step-by-step commands. (2) Exact shell commands for file organization using mkdir+mv with glob patterns and 2>/dev/null for missing extensions. (3) md5sum-based duplicate detection with clear reporting format showing all filenames per group. (4) Covered both task types (organize and dedup) in a single skill with labeled sections.
